# amiAgentAI
> AI Companion for Real Estate Agents — dual-engine verified

## What is amiAgentAI?
amiAgentAI is a dual-engine AI companion for real estate professionals. Two AI models (Grok + DeepSeek) cross-verify every answer — property descriptions, client communication, market insights, and compliance guidance you can trust.

## Features
- Property listing descriptions (residential, commercial, luxury, rental)
- Client communication drafts (inquiries, follow-ups, negotiations)
- Market insight frameworks and pricing strategy
- Legal compliance guidance (energy certs, fair housing, GDPR)
- Multilingual support for international transactions

## Architecture
- Dual-engine: Grok 4.5 (xAI) + DeepSeek
- Anti-confabulation: trigram-cosine concordance >= 0.45 required
- Stateless: messages processed in real-time, never stored

## Compliance
- EU AI Act (Reg. 2024/1689) Art. 50 — limited-risk, full transparency
- GDPR (Reg. 2016/679) — minimal data, no message storage

## Links
- Website: https://amiagentai.com
- API: https://amiagentai-api-production.up.railway.app
- Contact: hello@amiagentai.com
